_comment: Vetted, watermark-free meme clips for Zenie. Each was frame-checked clean. The drafting agent and the feedback agent pick the best-matching slug for a meme concept and write it to review-state.json as `meme_slug`; GitHub Actions renders meme_library/clips/<slug>.mp4 with the overlay text (fit-with-blur). NO-REPEAT RULE: a slug listed in meme_library/used.json has already been used and must NEVER be reused, even with a different caption — always pick from library minus used. When that set is empty, the library is exhausted; add new clips. To add a clip: source a clean HD GIF, frame-check every corner for watermarks/handles/network bugs, normalize to meme_library/clips/<slug>.mp4, and add an entry here. All clips render centered over a blurred background so the whole meme stays visible.

clips.title: Kermit typing furiously
clips.use_when: Over-the-top, manic productivity or self-improvement energy — journaling, planning, or manifesting like you're single-handedly about to change your entire life at 3am.
clips.example_overlay: me at 3am journaling like i'm about to change my entire life

clips.title: Confused Math Lady (woman with floating equations)
vibes: trying to make it make sense
clips.use_when: Frantically calculating or overthinking something simple — decoding a text, doing relationship math. The woman looks completely out of her mind doing equations.
clips.example_overlay: me calculating exactly how long to wait before texting him back

clips.title: Kombucha Girl (skeptical taste then reconsidering)
clips.use_when: Conflicted, mixed-feelings reaction — something is questionable but you're weirdly into it, or you start out judging and end up reconsidering (red flags you're choosing to ignore).
clips.example_overlay: when he says he's 'not really looking for anything serious'

clips.title: Awkward Look Monkey Puppet (nervous side-eye)
clips.use_when: Awkward, caught-red-handed, or guilty side-eye energy — when you said/did something you shouldn't have, or a situation suddenly got uncomfortable.
clips.example_overlay: when she asks if i've been journaling and i lie

clips.title: This Is Fine dog (sitting calmly in a burning room)
vibes: everything is chaos but pretending it's okay
clips.use_when: Forced-calm-amid-total-chaos energy — pretending everything is fine while your life is on fire. Coping, denial, holding it together by a thread.
clips.example_overlay: me journaling 'today was a good day' after the worst week of my life

clips.title: Michael Jackson eating popcorn (Thriller)
clips.use_when: Sitting back and enjoying drama that isn't yours — watching the group chat or a friend's situationship implode while you snack.
clips.example_overlay: me reading the group chat while two of my friends fight over the same guy

clips.title: Disaster Girl (smirking in front of a house fire)
clips.use_when: Gleeful chaos / villain energy — when you caused the mess and aren't sorry, or you're thriving in the disaster.
clips.example_overlay: me walking away after telling my friend exactly what i think of her ex

clips.title: Side-Eyeing Chloe (skeptical little girl)
clips.use_when: Deeply skeptical, unimpressed side-eye — when someone says something you absolutely do not believe.
clips.example_overlay: when he says 'i barely even talk to my ex anymore'

clips.title: Kris Jenner 'you're doing amazing sweetie'
clips.use_when: Over-the-top supportive bestie/mom energy — hyping someone up no matter how questionable the decision.
clips.example_overlay: me to my bestie after she texts him back in 0.2 seconds

clips.title: Shocked reaction at an awards show
clips.use_when: Genuine shock / jaw-drop — reacting to surprising news or a plot twist.
clips.example_overlay: when she says they're 'just friends' but he liked all her 2019 photos

clips.title: SpongeBob 'imagination' rainbow hands
clips.use_when: Romanticizing or fantasizing about a delusional best-case scenario in your head after the smallest sign of interest.
clips.example_overlay: me planning our whole future after one decent text back

clips.title: Mocking SpongeBob (chicken pose)
clips.use_when: Sarcastically mocking or repeating back something someone said — classic mocking-SpongeBob energy.
clips.example_overlay: him: i'm just really bad at texting back

clips.title: Nick Young confused (face with question marks)
clips.use_when: Pure confusion — when something genuinely doesn't add up and you have visible question marks over your head.
clips.example_overlay: when he says he misses me but never once makes a plan

clips.title: Rihanna dramatic eye-roll
clips.use_when: Dramatic exasperation / over-it eye-roll — when someone says something tiring or you're done with the conversation.
clips.example_overlay: when he says 'you're kind of overreacting'

clips.title: Confident hair flip (Zendaya)
clips.use_when: Unbothered, confident, main-character energy — flipping your hair and moving on, didn't let it faze you.
clips.example_overlay: me leaving him on read after he took 3 days to reply

clips.title: Forced uncomfortable smile (Britney)
clips.use_when: Strained, forced-smile politeness — pretending to be fine or nice while internally not okay.
clips.example_overlay: smiling at his situationship in the group photo

clips.title: Tom & Jerry heart eyes (swooning)
clips.use_when: Head-over-heels, heart-eyes infatuation — catching feelings fast, down bad after the smallest thing.
clips.example_overlay: me after he remembered my coffee order one time

clips.title: Homer Simpson head exploding (mind blown)
clips.use_when: A realization or plot twist so big your brain explodes — sudden clarity or shocking info.
clips.example_overlay: realizing the 'ick' was just me finally having standards

clips.title: Anime rage table flip
clips.use_when: Explosive 'I'm done' rage — flipping the table on a frustrating situation.
clips.example_overlay: me after the third 'wyd' text with zero actual plans

clips.title: Jim Halpert deadpan camera stare
clips.use_when: Deadpan look-to-camera — silently dead inside or done, reacting to something absurd someone said.
clips.example_overlay: him: 'i don't really do labels' — me staring into the camera:
